steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $350$.

steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $w+7=357$. To isolate $w$, subtract $7$ from both sides.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A — $51$ would come from dividing $357$ by $7$. Choice C — $364$ would come from adding $7$. The equation asks for $w$ in $w+7=357$, so $w=350$.
